issues.description: Counter ability should use trigger 'Counter', not 'OnAttacked'. Counter is a reactive interrupt mechanic.
Duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' or equivalent for battle-scoped effects, not 'EndOfBattle'. Power boost lasts during the battle resolution.
Second action uses 'TrashFromHand' but should be structured as optional conditional. The 'Then, you may trash' indicates optional user choice before the conditional reward triggers.

'GiveDon' is incorrect. Setting DON!! cards as active requires 'GiveDon' with proper duration (Permanent) and should target resting DON!! cards on your side. Current implementation conflates giving DON with activating existing DON.
Second effect object is entirely extraneous. DSL contains a stray 'Trigger' with opponent character rest action that has no basis in card text. This is a data corruption/copy-paste error.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, you may trash 1 card from your hand. If you do, set up to 3 of your DON!! cards as active.
